title: [Webinar] Eliminate Ghost Identities Before They Expose Your Enterprise Data
summary: In 2024, compromised service accounts and forgotten API keys were behind 68% of cloud breaches. Not phishing. Not weak passwords. Unmanaged non-human identities that nobody was watching.

sections.context:
This reflects continued use of phishing as an initial-access path in broader intrusion chains.

This fits the broader data-exposure trend where follow-on abuse of leaked information is common.

email_summary: In 2024, compromised service accounts and forgotten API keys were behind 68% of cloud breaches. Not weak passwords.
card_summary: In 2024, compromised service accounts and forgotten API keys were behind 68% of cloud breaches. Not weak passwords.

title: $13.74M Hack Shuts Down Sanctioned Grinex Exchange After Intelligence Claims
summary: Grinex, a Kyrgyzstan-incorporated cryptocurrency exchange sanctioned by the U.K. and the U.S. last year, said it's suspending operations after it blamed Western intelligence agencies for a $13.74 million hack.
email_summary: Grinex, a Kyrgyzstan-incorporated cryptocurrency exchange sanctioned by the U.K. and the U.S. last year, said it's suspending operations after it blamed Western intelligence agencies for a $13.74 million hack.
card_summary: Grinex, a Kyrgyzstan-incorporated cryptocurrency exchange sanctioned by the U.K. and the U.S. last year, said it's suspending operations after it blamed Western intelligence agencies for a $13.74 million hack.

title: Mirai Variant Nexcorium Exploits CVE-2024-3721 to Hijack TBK DVRs for DDoS Botnet
summary: Threat actors are exploiting security flaws in TBK DVR and end‑of‑life (EoL) TP-Link Wi-Fi routers to deploy Mirai-botnet variants on compromised devices, according to findings from Fortinet FortiGuard Labs and Palo Alto Networks Unit 42.

sections.context: This fits the broader data-exposure trend where follow-on abuse of leaked information is common.

email_summary: Threat actors are exploiting security flaws in TBK DVR and end‑of‑life (EoL) TP-Link Wi-Fi routers to deploy Mirai-botnet variants on compromised devices, according to findings from Fortinet FortiGuard Labs and Palo Alto Networks Unit 42. Tracked as CVE-2024-3721. Severity is rated high.

title: Critical flaw in Protobuf library enables JavaScript code execution
summary: Proof-of-concept exploit code has been published for a critical remote code execution flaw in protobuf.js, a widely used JavaScript implementation of Google's Protocol Buffers. [...]
email_summary: Proof-of-concept exploit code has been published for a critical remote code execution flaw in protobuf.js, a widely used JavaScript implementation of Google's Protocol Buffers. [...]. Severity is rated critical.

title: Microsoft Teams right-click paste broken by Edge update bug
summary: Microsoft is warning that a recent Microsoft Edge browser update introduced a bug that breaks right-click paste in chats in the Microsoft Teams desktop client. [...]

title: NAKIVO v11.2: Ransomware Defense, Faster Replication, vSphere 9, and Proxmox VE 9.0 Support
summary: NAKIVO Inc. announced the general availability of NAKIVO Backup & Replication v11.2, focused on fast, reliable, and proactive data protection. [...]

sections.context: This aligns with ongoing ransomware campaigns targeting operational continuity and recovery readiness.
